About the Doctor
Tirupati's Foremost
Cardiac & Vascular Surgeon

Dr. Hemachandra Tokala is Tirupati's leading specialist in Cardiothoracic & Vascular Surgery. He completed his M.Ch (CTS-NIMS) — Cardiothoracic & Vascular Surgery — from NIMS, Hyderabad, one of India's premier surgical institutions.

M.B.B.S · D.N.B · FIAGES M.Ch (CTS-NIMS) — Cardiothoracic & Vascular Surgery NIMS, Hyderabad · Trained in India's Top CTS Centre Senior Consultant & HOD — Liberty Heart Hospital

With over 15 years of surgical experience and 1500+ successful procedures, Dr. Tokala brings world-class expertise to open heart surgery, coronary bypass, valve repair, vascular interventions, and thoracic procedures.

Trust

Our Specialties
Cardiac & Vascular Care

World-class cardiac, vascular and thoracic surgery — delivered with precision and compassion at Liberty Heart Hospital, Tirupati.

Cardiac

Open Heart Surgery

Advanced cardiac repair under cardiopulmonary bypass — performed with M.Ch (CTS-NIMS) precision.

Book Consultation →
Cardiac

CABG Bypass Surgery

Coronary artery bypass grafting using arterial & venous grafts to restore blood flow.

Book Consultation →
Cardiac

Valve Repair / Replacement

Mitral, aortic and tricuspid valve procedures — repair or replacement as clinically indicated.

Book Consultation →
Thoracic

Chest & Lung Surgery

Lobectomy, decortication, thoracoscopy and all thoracic surgical procedures.

Book Consultation →
Vascular

Varicose Veins Treatment

Laser, RFA & VenaSeal — minimally invasive, walk-in walk-out varicose vein procedures.

Book Consultation →
Vascular

AV Fistula Surgery

Surgical AV fistula creation and revision for reliable haemodialysis access.

Book Consultation →
Vascular

Aneurysm Repair

Open and endovascular repair of aortic & peripheral aneurysms with durable outcomes.

Book Consultation →
Emergency

Vascular Emergencies

Rapid-response care for acute DVT, limb ischaemia, arterial injuries & vascular trauma.

Book Consultation →

🚨 Cardiac & Vascular Emergency?

Our team handles all emergencies — vascular injuries, chest trauma, acute DVT, cardiac events. Every second matters. Call immediately.

+91 70320 77766 Mon–Sat · 7:00 AM – 9:00 PM 📞 Call Emergency
